TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Keith_Askins, title = Keith_Askins, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Keith_Askins} }

S.FORM: Keith Askins sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 12, Keith Askins, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)

Keith Askins sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 12, Keith Askins, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: keitħ as~ɕkins~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, keitħ as~ɕkins~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
